[Key\AdventureMap\DebugMod]
  type=cycle
  Cycle 1: $\adventuremap\debugmod=0 condition=$Menu == 1
  Cycle 2: $\adventuremap\debugmod=1 condition=$Menu == 1
  Key=alt d
[Key\AdventureMap\LClick]
  type=hold
  $ClickDOWN=1.000000
  condition=$Menu == 1
  Key=VK_LBUTTON
[Key\AdventureMap\Menu]
  type=cycle
  Cycle 1: $\adventuremap\menu=0
  Cycle 2: $\adventuremap\menu=1
  Key=alt v
[Key\AdventureMap\PointLogic\RClick]
  type=hold
  $ClickDOWN=1.000000
  condition=$\AdventureMap\menu == 0
  Key=VK_RBUTTON
[Key\AdventureMap\RClick]
  type=hold
  $ClickDOWN=1.000000
  condition=$Menu == 1
  Key=VK_RBUTTON
[Key\AdventureMap\Regions\Blur]
  type=cycle
  Cycle 1: $\adventuremap\regions\blur=0
  Cycle 2: $\adventuremap\regions\blur=1
  Key=alt b
[Key\AdventureMap\Regions\Reg]
  type=cycle
  Cycle 1: $\adventuremap\regions\reg=0
  Cycle 2: $\adventuremap\regions\reg=1
  Key=ctrl b
[Key\AdventureMap\Shift]
  type=hold
  $SHIFTDOWN=1.000000
  condition=$Menu == 1
  Key=VK_SHIFT
[Key\Mods\chest visible.ini\Swap]
  type=cycle

[customshader\adventuremap\menucategories]
  vs=ReMap\drawmenu.hlsl
  ps=ReMap\drawmenu.hlsl
  blend=ADD SRC_ALPHA INV_SRC_ALPHA
  cull=none
  topology=TRIANGLE_LIST
  o0 = set_viewport bb
  x2 = $width
  y2 = $height
  x1 = $indexcategory
  x0 = $rollercategorymenu
  vs-t0 = null
  resourcepst0 = copy ps-t0
  resourcepst1 = copy ps-t1
  resourcepst2 = copy ps-t2
  resourcepst3 = copy ps-t3
  resourcepst4 = copy ps-t4
  resourcepst5 = copy ps-t5
  ps-t3 = resourcet0
  ps-t4 = resourcet1
  ps-t5 = resourcetsettings
  ps-t0 = resourcemenuarraypoints
  ps-t1 = resourcecomparison
  ps-t2 = resourcetabs
  vb0 = null
  ib = resourcemenuib
  drawindexed = 108,0,0
  post ps-t0 = copy resourcepst0
  post ps-t1 = copy resourcepst1
  post ps-t2 = copy resourcepst2
  post ps-t3 = copy resourcepst3
  post ps-t4 = copy resourcepst4
  post ps-t5 = copy resourcepst5

  else if $indexcategory == 5

  cs-t1 = resourcetab6
  else if $indexcategory == 7
  cs-t1 = resourcetab7

  else if $indexcategory == 11
  cs-t1 = resourcetab11
  else if $indexcategory == 12
  cs-t1 = resourcetab12
  else if $indexcategory == 13
  cs-t1 = resourcetab13
  else if $indexcategory == 14
  cs-t1 = resourcetab14

[customshader\adventuremap\mapdraw\map]
  vs=Shaders\MapDrawMap.hlsl
  ps=Shaders\DrawMap.hlsl
  blend=ADD SRC_ALPHA INV_SRC_ALPHA
  cull=none
  topology=triangle_list
  vs-t0 = vb0
  y199 = $\adventuremap\sizemap
  z199 = $\adventuremap\pointtransparency
  resourcevbcopy = copy vb0
  resourceibcopy = copy ib
  if $worldtype == 0
  vb0 = null
  ib = null
  else if $worldtype == 1
  vb0 = resourcevbworld
  ib = resourceibworld
  else if $worldtype == 2
  vb0 = resourcevbchasm
  ib = resourceibchasm
  else if $worldtype == 3
  vb0 = resourcevbenkanomiya
  ib = resourceibenkanomiya
  else if $worldtype == 4
  vb0 = resourcevbsea
  ib = resourceibsea
  else if $worldtype == 5
  vb0 = resourcevbmountain
  ib = resourceibmountain
  endif
  ps-t20 = resourcepointarray
  ps-t21 = copy resource\adventuremap\points
  ps-t22 = copy resource\adventuremap\pointlogic\pointsid
  drawindexed = auto
  post vb0 = copy resourcevbcopy
  post ib = copy resourceibcopy

  ib = resourceibsea
  else if $worldtype == 5
  vb0 = resourcevbmountain
  vs-t22 = resourcenormalcoordmountain
  ib = resourceibmountain
  endif

  drawindexed = auto

  x87 = $button_size * res_height/res_width
  y87 = $button_size
  z87 = $off_x + $button_offset_x + 1 * $button_space_x
  w87 = $off_y + $button_offset_y + 0 * $button_space_y
  if cursor_x > z87 && cursor_x < z87 + x87 / 2 && cursor_y > w87 && cursor_y < w87 + y87
  if $click
  ps-t100 = resourcebuttonleftpressed
  if $button_pressed == 0
  $jacket = $jacket - 1
  if $jacket < 0
  $jacket = 3
  endif
  $button_pressed = 1
  endif
  else
  ps-t100 = resourcebuttonleft
  endif
  else
  ps-t100 = resourcebuttonempty
  endif

[commandlist\mods\personajes\parrley - aino clink clank snowland\aino.ini\button2right]
  x87 = $button_size * res_height/res_width
  y87 = $button_size
  z87 = $off_x + $button_offset_x + 1 * $button_space_x
  w87 = $off_y + $button_offset_y + 0 * $button_space_y
  if cursor_x > z87 + x87 / 2 && cursor_x < z87 + x87 && cursor_y > w87 && cursor_y < w87 + y87
  if $click
  ps-t100 = resourcebuttonrightpressed
  if $button_pressed == 0
  $jacket = $jacket + 1
  if $jacket > 3
  $jacket = 0
  endif
  $button_pressed = 1
  endif
  else
  ps-t100 = resourcebuttonright
  endif
  else
  ps-t100 = resourcebuttonempty
  endif
  run = customshadermenu

  local $ps = ps

  elif $vs == 037730.3
  run = commandlistfixnatlan

  run = commandlistfixheightmap7
  elif $ps == 037731.14 && $vs == 037733
  run = commandlistfixheightmap4
  elif $ps == 037731.15 && $vs == 037731.79
  run = commandlistfixheightmap5
  elif $ps == 037730.16 && $vs == 037733

  elif $vs == 037731.57

  elif $ps == 037731.79 && $vs == 037731.79

  elif $ps == 037731.79 && $vs == 037732
  run = commandlistfixheightmap9
  elif $ps == 037730.17
  run = commandlistfixheightmap7
  elif $ps == 037730.18
  run = commandlistfixheightmap8
  elif $ps == 037730.1
  run = commandlistoldslotconfig
  elif $ps == 037731.3
  run = commandlistfixreflection
  elif $vs == 037731.1 || $ps == 037731.1
  run = commandlistlunafixnonormalmap
  elif $vs == 037731.0 || $vs == 037730.9 || $ps == 037730.9 || $ps == 037731.2 || $vs == 037732
  run = commandlistlunafixnormalmap
  elif $vs == 037733.0
  run = commandlistfixface
  elif $vs == 037730.0 || $vs == 037730.1 || $vs == 037730.7 || $vs == 037733.1
  run = commandlistfixreflection
  elif $ps == 037734
  run = commandlistfixdash
  elif $vs == 037735
  run = commandlistfixskirklimbs
  elif $vs == 037736
  run = commandlistoldslotconfig
  elif $ps == 037737

  elif $vs == 037733.2
  run = commandlistfixcolumbinaeye

[commandlist\global\orfix\reference]
  local $vs = vs
  local $buffer = vb0
  if $buffer == 730037.0
  $traveleractive = 1
  elif $buffer == 730037.1
  $gamingactive = 1
  endif
  if $vs == 12345564
  $traveleractive = 0
  $gamingactive = 0
  endif
  if $traveleractive == 1 && ($vs != 037730.7)
  resourcediffuse = ref ps-t0 unless_null
  resourcelightmap = ref ps-t1 unless_null
  resourcenormalmap = null
  elif $gamingactive == 1
  resourcenormalmap = ref ps-t0 unless_null
  resourcediffuse = ref ps-t2 unless_null
  resourcelightmap = ref ps-t3 unless_null
  else
  resourcenormalmap = ref ps-t0 unless_null
  resourcediffuse = ref ps-t1 unless_null
  resourcelightmap = ref ps-t2 unless_null
  endif

[commandlist\texfx\clearinstancevalues]
  $bloom_intensity = 1
  $glow_intensity = 1
  $bloom = 1
  $glow = 1
  $hue = 0
  $sat = 0
  $val = 0
  if $debug_rgb
  $cos_in = time/1
  run = commandlistrun_cos
  $bloom_intensity = $cos_out*0.15+0.4
  $cos_in = time/2
  run = commandlistrun_cos
  $glow_intensity = -$cos_out*0.15+0.4
  $cos_in = time
  run = commandlistrun_cos
  $\texfx\hue = $cos_out*0.5+0.5
  $cos_in = time*2
  run = commandlistrun_cos
  $cos_in = time/2
  run = commandlistrun_cos
  $\texfx\sat = -$cos_out*50
  endif
  run = commandlistsetinstancevalues

[commandlist\mods\personajes\parrley - aino clink clank snowland\aino.ini\menu]
  local $v = 0
  if $menu == 1
  if $click && !$prev_click
  if cursor_x > $off_x-0.2 && cursor_x < $off_x +0.05 + $size_x && cursor_y > $off_y-$size_y/23.6 && cursor_y < $off_y+$size_y/11.8
  $drag = 1
  $drag_off_x = cursor_x - $off_x
  $drag_off_y = cursor_y - $off_y
  endif
  endif
  if $drag && $click
  $off_x = cursor_x - $drag_off_x
  $off_y = cursor_y - $drag_off_y
  endif
  if !$click && $drag
  $drag = 0
  endif
  $prev_click = $click
  if $click
  if cursor_x > $off_x+0.05 && cursor_x < $off_x+0.05+$icon_size && cursor_y > $off_y+0.80 && cursor_y < $off_y+0.80+$icon_size
  $toggle_variable1 = 1 - $toggle_variable1
  endif
  if cursor_x > $off_x+0.25 && cursor_x < $off_x+0.25+$icon_size && cursor_y > $off_y+0.80 && cursor_y < $off_y+0.80+$icon_size
  $toggle_variable2 = 1 - $toggle_variable2
  endif
  endif
  run = commandlistbackdrop
  run = commandlisticon1
  run = commandlistbutton1left
  run = commandlistbutton1right
  run = commandlisticon2
  run = commandlistbutton2left
  run = commandlistbutton2right
  run = commandlisticon3
  run = commandlistbutton3left
  run = commandlistbutton3right
  run = commandlisticon4
  run = commandlistbutton4left
  run = commandlistbutton4right
  if !$click
  $button_pressed = 0
  endif
  endif

  local $ps = ps
  local $vs = vs
  run = commandlisthullhack
  run = commandlistsetinstancevalues
  run = commandlistsetresourcereferences
  if $vs == 3.4
  if $use_default_shader == 0
  $use_default_shader = -1
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.0_3.4
  endif
  if $use_default_shader == 1
  $use_default_shader = -1
  if $ps == 037730.0
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.0_3.4
  else
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.1_3.4
  endif
  endif
  elif $vs == 4.5
  if $use_default_shader == 0
  $use_default_shader = -1
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.0_4.5
  endif
  if $use_default_shader == 1
  $use_default_shader = -1
  if $ps == 037730.0
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.0_4.5
  else
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.1_4.5
  endif
  endif
  elif $vs == 5.0 || $vs == 5.1
  if $use_default_shader == 0 || $use_default_shader == 2
  $use_default_shader = -1
  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencynatlan.0
  else
  run = customshadertransparencynatlansupresshh.0
  endif
  elif $use_default_shader == 1 || $use_default_shader == 3

  if $ps//1 == 037730 && $ps != 037730.1
  if x70//1 == 037730

  else
  run = customshadertransparencynatlansupresshh.1
  endif
  else
  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencynatlan.0
  else
  run = customshadertransparencynatlansupresshh.0
  endif
  endif
  else
  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencynatlan.1
  else
  run = customshadertransparencynatlansupresshh.1
  endif
  endif
  endif
  else
  if $use_default_shader == 0
  $use_default_shader = -1
  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.0
  else
  run = customshadertransparencysupresshh.0
  endif
  endif
  if $use_default_shader == 1
  $use_default_shader = -1
  if $ps//1 == 037730 && $ps != 037730.1
  if x70//1 == 037730
  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.0
  else
  run = customshadertransparencysupresshh.0
  endif
  else
  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.1
  else
  run = customshadertransparencysupresshh.1
  endif
  endif
  else
  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencydefault.1
  else
  run = customshadertransparencysupresshh.1
  endif
  endif
  endif
  if $use_default_shader == 2

  if !$hull_hack_val
  run = customshadertransparencynatlan.0
  else
  run = customshadertransparencynatlansupresshh.0
  endif
  endif

  else

  endif

  endif

  endif
  else
  run = customshadercomponentsupresshh.1
  endif
  endif

[commandlist\texfx\run_cos]
  local $pi = 3.14159265
  if $cos_in == inf || $cos_in == -inf || $cos_in == nan || $cos_in == null
  $cos_out = nan
  else
  local $x = ($cos_in+$pi/2)%$pi-$pi/2
  local $xx = $x*$x
  local $f0 = -($xx/2)
  local $f1 = (($xx*$xx)/24)
  local $f2 = -(($xx*$xx*$xx)/720)
  local $f3 = (($xx*$xx*$xx*$xx)/40320)
  local $f4 = -(($xx*$xx*$xx*$xx*$xx)/3628800)
  $cos_out = -((($cos_in+$pi/2)/$pi)%2//1*2-1) * (1+$f0+$f1+$f2+$f3+$f4)
  endif
  $cos_in = 0
[commandlist\texfx\setinstancevalues]
  w69 = $outline_mode
  if $outline_mode_supercide == 1
  $outline_mode_supercide = 0
  w69 = 1
  elif $outline_mode_supercide == -1
  $outline_mode_supercide = 0
  w69 = 0
  endif
  y70 = $glow*($glow_intensity==1)+$glow_intensity*($glow_intensity!=1)
  z70 = $bloom*($bloom_intensity==1)+$bloom_intensity*($bloom_intensity!=1)
  x71 = $hue
  y71 = $sat
  z71 = $val
  w71 = $seizure

[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AA]
  shader_model=vs_5_0
  temps=ini
  post run = commandlistclean
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AA.InsertDeclarations]
  dcl_resource_texture1d (float,float,float,float) t120
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AA.Pattern]
  (mov r\d.x, cb\d\[0\].\w\n
  mov r\d.y, cb\d\[1\].\w\n
  mov r\d.z, cb\d\[2\].\w\n
  add )(r\d)(.xyw, -cb1\[5\].xyxz, cb\d\[3\].xyxz\n)
  (mov r\d.w, r\d.\w\n
  mov r\d.xyz, v0.xyzx\n
  mov r\d.w, l\(1.000000\)\n
  dp4 r\d.x, r\d.xyzw, r\d.xyzw\n)
--------- final pcre2 regex pattern used after ini parsing ---------
(mov r\d.x, cb\d\[0\].\w\nmov r\d.y, cb\d\[1\].\w\nmov r\d.z, cb\d\[2\].\w\nadd )(r\d)(.xyw, -cb1\[5\].xyxz, cb\d\[3\].xyxz\n)(mov r\d.w, r\d.\w\nmov r\d.xyz, v0.xyzx\nmov r\d.w, l\(1.000000\)\ndp4 r\d.x, r\d.xyzw, r\d.xyzw\n)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AA.Pattern.Replace]
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(169,0), t120.xyzw\n
  $1$2$3
  add $2.y, $2.y, ${ini}.x\n
  $4
--------- final pcre2 replace string used after ini parsing ---------
ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(169,0), t120.xyzw\n$1$2$3add $2.y, $2.y, ${ini}.x\n$4

[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AASecondPass]
  shader_model=vs_5_0
  temps=ini
  post run = commandlistclean
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AASecondPass.InsertDeclarations]
  dcl_resource_texture1d (float,float,float,float) t120
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AASecondPass.Pattern]
  (mov o0.w, r4.w\n
  add o0.z, -r1.y, r1.z\n
  mov o1.xyzw, v2.xyzw\n)
  (mul r4.xyzw, )(r0.y)(yyy, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw\n
  mad r4.xyzw, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw, r0.xxxx, r4.xyzw\n
  mad r4.xyzw, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw, r1.wwww, r4.xyzw\n
  mad o2.xyzw, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw, r1.xxxx, r4.xyzw\n
  movc r1.xyz, cb0\[\d+\].xxxx, v4.xyzx, v0.xyzx\n
  mul r4.xyzw, r1.yyyy, cb5\[1\].xyzw\n
  mad r4.xyzw, cb5\[0\].xyzw, r1.xxxx, r4.xyzw\n
  mad r1.xyzw, cb5\[2\].xyzw, r1.zzzz, r4.xyzw\n
  add r1.xyzw, r1.xyzw, cb5\[3\].xyzw\n
  mul r3.yzw, r1.yyyy, cb0\[\d+\].xxyz\n
  mad r3.yzw, cb0\[\d+\].xxyz, r1.xxxx, r3.yyzw\n
  mad r1.xyz, cb0\[\d+\].xyzx, r1.zzzz, r3.yzwy\n
  mad r1.xyz, cb0\[\d+\].xyzx, r1.wwww, r1.xyzx\n
  mul r0.x, r0.w, -r1.z\n
  lt r0.x, r0.x, cb0\[\d+\].y\n
  movc r4.xyzw, r0.xxxx, r5.xyzw, r6.xyzw\n
  mad r0.x, -r1.z, r0.w, -r4.x\n
  add r0.yw, -r4.xxxz, r4.yyyw\n
  max r0.y, r0.y, l\(0.001000\)\n)
--------- final pcre2 regex pattern used after ini parsing ---------
(mov o0.w, r4.w\nadd o0.z, -r1.y, r1.z\nmov o1.xyzw, v2.xyzw\n)(mul r4.xyzw, )(r0.y)(yyy, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw\nmad r4.xyzw, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw, r0.xxxx, r4.xyzw\nmad r4.xyzw, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw, r1.wwww, r4.xyzw\nmad o2.xyzw, cb0\[\d+\].xyzw, r1.xxxx, r4.xyzw\nmovc r1.xyz, cb0\[\d+\].xxxx, v4.xyzx, v0.xyzx\nmul r4.xyzw, r1.yyyy, cb5\[1\].xyzw\nmad r4.xyzw, cb5\[0\].xyzw, r1.xxxx, r4.xyzw\nmad r1.xyzw, cb5\[2\].xyzw, r1.zzzz, r4.xyzw\nadd r1.xyzw, r1.xyzw, cb5\[3\].xyzw\nmul r3.yzw, r1.yyyy, cb0\[\d+\].xxyz\nmad r3.yzw, cb0\[\d+\].xxyz, r1.xxxx, r3.yyzw\nmad r1.xyz, cb0\[\d+\].xyzx, r1.zzzz, r3.yzwy\nmad r1.xyz, cb0\[\d+\].xyzx, r1.wwww, r1.xyzx\nmul r0.x, r0.w, -r1.z\nlt r0.x, r0.x, cb0\[\d+\].y\nmovc r4.xyzw, r0.xxxx, r5.xyzw, r6.xyzw\nmad r0.x, -r1.z, r0.w, -r4.x\nadd r0.yw, -r4.xxxz, r4.yyyw\nmax r0.y, r0.y, l\(0.001000\)\n)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\AASecondPass.Pattern.Replace]
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(169,0), t120.xyzw\n
  $1
  add $3, $3, -${ini}.x\n
  $2$3$4

[ShaderRegex\global\offset\Mesh.Pattern]
  (?P<AAA>mul r\d+.\w+, )(?P<BBB>r\d+.\w)(?P<CCC>\w+, cb\d+\[\d+\].\w+\n
  mad r\d+.\w+, cb\d+\[\d+\].\w+, r\d+.\w+, r\d+.\w+\n
  mad r\d+.\w+, cb\d+\[\d+\].\w+, r\d+.\w+, r\d+.\w+\n
  mad r\d+.\w+, cb\d+\[\d+\].\w+, r\d+.\w+, r\d+.\w+\n
  mad r\d+.\w+, -cb\d+\[\d+\].\w+, r\d+.\w+, r\d+.\w+\n
  ne r\d+.\w+, l\(0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.000000\), cb\d+\[\d+\].\w+\n

--------- final pcre2 regex pattern used after ini parsing ---------

[ShaderRegex\global\offset\MeshNatlanFace.Pattern]

  mul (r\d+).xyzw, [vr]\d+.yyyy, cb2\[1\].xyzw\n
  mad r\d+.xyzw, cb2\[0\].xyzw, [vr]\d+.xxxx, r\d+.xyzw\n
  mad r\d+.xyzw, cb2\[2\].xyzw, [vr]\d+.zzzz, r\d+.xyzw\n
  add r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw, cb2\[3\].xyzw\n

  mad r0.y, cb3\[11\].z, r\d+.z, r0.y\n
  mad r0.y, cb3\[12\].z, r\d+.w, r0.y\n

  add r\d+.xyw, -cb1\[5\].xyxz, cb2\[3\].xyxz\n)
--------- final pcre2 regex pattern used after ini parsing ---------
(mul o\d+.xyz, r\d+.yyyy, r\d+.xyzx\nmul (r\d+).xyzw, [vr]\d+.yyyy, cb2\[1\].xyzw\nmad r\d+.xyzw, cb2\[0\].xyzw, [vr]\d+.xxxx, r\d+.xyzw\nmad r\d+.xyzw, cb2\[2\].xyzw, [vr]\d+.zzzz, r\d+.xyzw\nadd r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw, cb2\[3\].xyzw\nmul r0.y, r\d+.y, cb3\[10\].z\nmad r0.y, cb3\[9\].z, r\d+.x, r0.y\nmad r0.y, cb3\[11\].z, r\d+.z, r0.y\nmad r0.y, cb3\[12\].z, r\d+.w, r0.y\nmov o6.w, -r0.y\nadd r\d+.xyw, -cb1\[5\].xyxz, cb2\[3\].xyxz\n)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\MeshNatlanFace.Pattern.Replace]
  $1\n
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(169,0), t120.xyzw\n
  if_nz cb12\[3\].y\n
  add $2.xyw, -cb2\[3\].xyxz, cb12\[3\].xyxz\n

[ShaderRegex\global\offset\Outline.Pattern]
  (\s+mov r\d+.x, cb3\[0\].x
  \s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].x
  \s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].x
  \s+mov r\d+.w, r\d+.x
  (\s+mov r\d+.xyz, v0.xyzx)?
  \s+mov r\d+.w, l\(1.000000\)
  \s+dp4 r\d+.x, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw
  \s+mov r\d+.x, cb3\[0\].y
  \s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].y
  \s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].y
  \s+mov r\d+.w, r\d+.y
  \s+dp4 r\d+.y, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw

  \s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].z
  \s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].z
  \s+dp4 r\d+.z, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw
  \s+mov r\d+.x, cb3\[0\].w
  \s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].w
  \s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].w
  \s+mov r\d+.w, cb3\[3\].w)
  (\s+)(dp4 r\d+.w, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw)\n
--------- final pcre2 regex pattern used after ini parsing ---------
(\s+mov r\d+.x, cb3\[0\].x\s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].x\s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].x\s+mov r\d+.w, r\d+.x(\s+mov r\d+.xyz, v0.xyzx)?\s+mov r\d+.w, l\(1.000000\)\s+dp4 r\d+.x, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw\s+mov r\d+.x, cb3\[0\].y\s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].y\s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].y\s+mov r\d+.w, r\d+.y\s+dp4 r\d+.y, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw\s+mov (r\d+).x, cb3\[0\].z\s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].z\s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].z\s+dp4 r\d+.z, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw\s+mov r\d+.x, cb3\[0\].w\s+mov r\d+.y, cb3\[1\].w\s+mov r\d+.z, cb3\[2\].w\s+mov r\d+.w, cb3\[3\].w)(\s+)(dp4 r\d+.w, r\d+.xyzw, r\d+.xyzw)\n
--------------------------------------------------------------------
[ShaderRegex\global\offset\Outline.Pattern.Replace]
  \nld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(169,0), t120.xyzw\n

[ShaderRegex\global\offset\OutlineNatlan.Pattern]
  (mul r1.xyzw, v0.yyyy, cb\d\[1\].xyzw\n
  mad r1.xyzw, cb\d\[0\].xyzw, v0.xxxx, r1.xyzw\n
  mad r1.xyzw, cb\d\[2\].xyzw, v0.zzzz, r1.xyzw\n
  add r1.xyzw, r1.xyzw, cb\d\[3\].xyzw\n
  mul r0.w, r1.y, cb\d\[10\].z\n
  mad r0.w, cb3\[9\].z, r1.x, r0.w\n
  mad r0.w, cb3\[11\].z, r1.z, r0.w\n
  mad r0.w, cb3\[12\].z, r1.w, r0.w\n

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\Diffuse2Sided.Pattern.Replace]
  ${MatchDiffuse}
  ${ModestyB}
  mov ${texcoord}.xyzw, ${TexcoordX}\n
  ${TillTexcord}\n
  ${Tillo1}\n
  mov ${o1}.${o1var}\n
  mov ${storage}.xyxx, ${o1}.wwww\n
  ${Tillo2}\n
  mov ${o2}.${o2var}\n
  ${TillBloom}\n
  mov ${storage}.w, ${Bloom}\n
  ${TillRet}
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(69,0), t120.xyzw\n
  if_z ${ini}.y\n
  \t	resinfo_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${dim}.xyyy, l(0), t69.xyzw\n
  \t	if_nz ${dim}.xy\n
  \t\t    ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(70,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${tex69}.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    mul ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${ini}.yz\n
  \t\t    add_sat ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${storage}.wx\n
  \t\t    if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t      ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${color}.xyzw, l(71,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t      lt ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, l(0.25)\n
  \t\t\t      min ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, ${color}.w\n
  \t\t\t      if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o1}.xyzx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t        mov r0.w, l(1.0)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o1.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o2}.xywz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(-1)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o2.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t      endif\n
  \t\t    endif\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r0.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    if_nz r0.y\n
  \t\t\t		mov o1.w, ${tex69}.y\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	if_nz r0.z\n
  \t\t\t		mov o4.x, ${tex69}.z\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	discard_nz r0.x\n
  \t  endif\n
  endif\n
  ret

  shader_model=ps_4_0 ps_5_0
  temps=ini tex69 dim storage color o1 o2 texcoord
  filter_index=4243.069824
  if ps-t69 === 0
  run = commandlistclearinstancevalues
  ps-t69 = null
  endif
  if ps-t70 === 0
  ps-t70 = null
  endif
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\Diffuse2Sided53.InsertDeclarations]
  dcl_resource_texture1d (float,float,float,float) t120
  dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t69
  dcl_sampler s15, mode_default
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\Diffuse2Sided53.Pattern]
  (?s)(?<MatchDiffuse>
  dcl_input_ps_sgv constant v\d{1,2}\.x, is_front_face\n
  dcl_output o0\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o1\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o2\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o3\.x\n
  dcl_output o4\.x\n
  dcl_output o5\.x\n
  .*)
  (?P<ModestyB>^\s*if_nz -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+div -?r\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ge -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+frc -?r\d+\.\w+, \|-?r\d+\.\w+\|\n
  ^\s+movc -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ftou -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mad -?r\d+\.\w+, -?(cb\d\[\d+\]|r\d+)\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\), -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+add -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+lt -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n.*)
  (?P<TillTexcord>^sample_[b_]{0,2}indexable\(texture2d\)\(float,float,float,float\) r\d\d?\.[xyzw]{3,4}, (?P<TexcoordX>r\d\d?\.(xyxx|yzyy|zwzz)), t[012]\.[xyzw]{3,4}, s\d(, \w\d+(\.[xyzw]+)?)?$)
  (?P<TillGlow>.*sqrt o1\.w, (?<Glow>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))
  (?<Tillo2Pick>.*movc o2\.z, (?<o2Pick>r\d\.[xyzw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<Tillo1>.*mov o1\.xyz, (?<o1var>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<Tillo2>.*mov o2\.(?<o2var>[xyw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<TillBloom>.*mov o4.x, (?<Bloom>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<TillRet>.*)
  ret

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\Diffuse2Sided53.Pattern.Replace]
  ${MatchDiffuse}
  ${ModestyB}
  mov ${texcoord}.xyzw, ${TexcoordX}\n
  ${TillTexcord}\n
  ${TillGlow}\n
  sqrt ${storage}.xyxx, ${Glow}\n
  ${Tillo2Pick}\n
  movc ${storage}.z, ${o2Pick}\n
  ${Tillo1}\n
  mov ${o1}.xyz, ${o1var}\n
  ${Tillo2}\n
  mov ${o2}.${o2var}\n
  mov ${o2}.z, ${storage}.z\n
  ${TillBloom}\n
  mov ${storage}.w, ${Bloom}\n
  ${TillRet}
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(69,0), t120.xyzw\n
  if_z ${ini}.y\n
  \t	resinfo_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${dim}.xyyy, l(0), t69.xyzw\n
  \t	if_nz ${dim}.xy\n
  \t\t    ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(70,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${tex69}.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    mul ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${ini}.yz\n
  \t\t    add ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${storage}.wx\n
  \t\t    if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t      ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${color}.xyzw, l(71,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t      lt ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, l(0.25)\n
  \t\t\t      min ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, ${color}.w\n
  \t\t\t      if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o1}.xyzx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t        mov r0.w, l(1.0)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o1.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o2}.xywz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(-1)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o2.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t      endif\n
  \t\t    endif\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r0.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    if_nz r0.y\n
  \t\t\t		mov o1.w, ${tex69}.y\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	if_nz r0.z\n
  \t\t\t		mov o4.x, ${tex69}.z\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	discard_nz r0.x\n
  \t  endif\n
  endif\n
  ret

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency]
  shader_model=ps_4_0 ps_5_0
  temps=ini tex69 dim storage color o1 o2 texcoord
  filter_index=4243.049805
  if ps-t69 === 0
  run = commandlistclearinstancevalues
  ps-t69 = null
  endif
  if ps-t70 === 0
  ps-t70 = null
  endif
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency.InsertDeclarations]
  dcl_resource_texture1d (float,float,float,float) t120
  dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t69
  dcl_sampler s15, mode_default
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency.Pattern]
  (?s)(?<MatchDiffuse>
  dcl_output o0\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o1\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o2\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o3\.x\n
  dcl_output o4\.x\n
  dcl_output o5\.x\n
  .*)
  (?P<ModestyB>^\s*if_nz -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+div -?r\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ge -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+frc -?r\d+\.\w+, \|-?r\d+\.\w+\|\n
  ^\s+movc -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ftou -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mad -?r\d+\.\w+, -?(cb\d\[\d+\]|r\d+)\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\), -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+add -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+lt -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n.*)
  (?P<TillTexcord>sample_[b_]{0,2}indexable\(texture2d\)\(float,float,float,float\) r\d\d?\.[xyzw]{3,4}, (?P<TexcoordX>v(2|1[01])\.(xyxx|yzyy|zwzz)), t[01]\.[xyzw]{3,4}, s\d(, \w\d+(\.[xyzw]+)?)?$)
  (?P<Tillo1>.*mov o1\.(?<o1var>[xyzw]{4}, r\d\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<Tillo2>.*mov o2\.(?<o2var>[xyzw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<TillBloom>.*mov o4.x, (?<Bloom>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<TillRet>.*)
  ret
--------- final pcre2 regex pattern used after ini parsing ---------
(?s)(?<MatchDiffuse>dcl_output o0\.xyzw\ndcl_output o1\.xyzw\ndcl_output o2\.xyzw\ndcl_output o3\.x\ndcl_output o4\.x\ndcl_output o5\.x\n.*)(?P<ModestyB>^\s*if_nz -?r\d+\.\w+\n^\s+div -?r\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+\n^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+\n^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n^\s+ge -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n^\s+frc -?r\d+\.\w+, \|-?r\d+\.\w+\|\n^\s+movc -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n^\s+ftou -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n^\s+dp\d+\ r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n^\s+mad -?r\d+\.\w+, -?(cb\d\[\d+\]|r\d+)\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\), -?r\d+\.\w+\n^\s+add -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n^\s+lt -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n.*)(?P<TillTexcord>sample_[b_]{0,2}indexable\(texture2d\)\(float,float,float,float\) r\d\d?\.[xyzw]{3,4}, (?P<TexcoordX>v(2|1[01])\.(xyxx|yzyy|zwzz)), t[01]\.[xyzw]{3,4}, s\d(, \w\d+(\.[xyzw]+)?)?$)(?P<Tillo1>.*mov o1\.(?<o1var>[xyzw]{4}, r\d\.[xyzw]+))(?P<Tillo2>.*mov o2\.(?<o2var>[xyzw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+))(?P<TillBloom>.*mov o4.x, (?<Bloom>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))(?P<TillRet>.*)ret

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency.Pattern.Replace]
  ${MatchDiffuse}
  ${ModestyB}
  mov ${texcoord}.xyzw, ${TexcoordX}\n
  ${TillTexcord}\n
  ${Tillo1}\n
  mov ${o1}.${o1var}\n
  mov ${storage}.xyxx, ${o1}.wwww\n
  ${Tillo2}\n
  mov ${o2}.${o2var}\n
  ${TillBloom}\n
  mov ${storage}.wwww, ${Bloom}\n
  ${TillRet}
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(69,0), t120.xyzw\n
  if_z ${ini}.y\n
  \t	resinfo_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${dim}.xyyy, l(0), t69.xyzw\n
  \t	if_nz ${dim}.xy\n
  \t\t    ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(70,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${tex69}.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    mul ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${ini}.yz\n
  \t\t    add ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${storage}.wx\n
  \t\t    if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t      ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${color}.xyzw, l(71,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t      lt ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, l(0.25)\n
  \t\t\t      min ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, ${color}.w\n
  \t\t\t      if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o1}.xyzx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t        mov r0.w, l(1.0)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o1.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o2}.xywz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(-1)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o2.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t      endif\n
  \t\t    endif\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r0.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    if_nz r0.y\n
  \t\t\t		mov o1.w, ${tex69}.y\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	if_nz r0.z\n
  \t\t\t		mov o4.x, ${tex69}.z\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	discard_nz r0.x\n
  \t  endif\n
  endif\n
  ret

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency53]
  shader_model=ps_4_0 ps_5_0
  temps=ini tex69 dim storage color o1 o2 texcoord
  filter_index=4243.049805
  if ps-t69 === 0
  run = commandlistclearinstancevalues
  ps-t69 = null
  endif
  if ps-t70 === 0
  ps-t70 = null
  endif
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency53.InsertDeclarations]
  dcl_resource_texture1d (float,float,float,float) t120
  dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t69
  dcl_sampler s15, mode_default
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency53.Pattern]
  (?s)(?<MatchDiffuse>
  dcl_output o0\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o1\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o2\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o3\.x\n
  dcl_output o4\.x\n
  dcl_output o5\.x\n
  .*)
  (?P<ModestyB>^\s*if_nz -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+div -?r\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ge -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+frc -?r\d+\.\w+, \|-?r\d+\.\w+\|\n
  ^\s+movc -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ftou -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mad -?r\d+\.\w+, -?(cb\d\[\d+\]|r\d+)\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\), -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+add -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+lt -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n.*)
  (?P<TillTexcord>sample_[b_]{0,2}indexable\(texture2d\)\(float,float,float,float\) r\d\d?\.[xyzw]{3,4}, (?P<TexcoordX>v(2|1[01])\.(xyxx|yzyy|zwzz)), t[01]\.[xyzw]+, s\d(, \w\d+(\.[xyzw]+)?)?$)
  (?P<TillGlow>.*sqrt o1\.w, (?<Glow>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))
  (?<Tillo2Pick>.*movc o2\.z, (?<o2Pick>r\d\.[xyzw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<Tillo1>.*mov o1\.xyz, (?<o1var>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<Tillo2>.*mov o2\.(?<o2var>[xyw]+, r\d\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<TillBloom>.*mov o4.x, (?<Bloom>r\d+\.[xyzw]+))
  (?P<TillRet>.*)
  ret

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\DiffuseTransparency53.Pattern.Replace]
  ${MatchDiffuse}
  ${ModestyB}
  mov ${texcoord}.xyzw, ${TexcoordX}\n
  ${TillTexcord}\n
  ${TillGlow}\n
  sqrt ${storage}.xyxx, ${Glow}\n
  ${Tillo2Pick}\n
  movc ${storage}.z, ${o2Pick}\n
  ${Tillo1}\n
  mov ${o1}.xyz, ${o1var}\n
  ${Tillo2}\n
  mov ${o2}.${o2var}\n
  mov ${o2}.z, ${storage}.z\n
  ${TillBloom}\n
  mov ${storage}.w, ${Bloom}\n
  ${TillRet}
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(69,0), t120.xyzw\n
  if_z ${ini}.y\n
  \t	resinfo_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${dim}.xyyy, l(0), t69.xyzw\n
  \t	if_nz ${dim}.xy\n
  \t\t    ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(70,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${tex69}.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    mul ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${ini}.yz\n
  \t\t    add_sat ${tex69}.yz, ${tex69}.yz, ${storage}.wx\n
  \t\t    if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t      ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${color}.xyzw, l(71,0), t120.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t      lt ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, l(0.25)\n
  \t\t\t      min ${tex69}.w, ${tex69}.w, ${color}.w\n
  \t\t\t      if_nz ${tex69}.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o1}.xyzx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t        mov r0.w, l(1.0)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o1.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.zw, l(0,0,-1.000000,0.666667)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,-0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r2.xyzw, ${o2}.xywz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xy, r2.zyzz\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r1.xy, r0.yxyy\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r2.y, r0.y, r2.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r2.yyyy, r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		lt r1.x, r2.x, r0.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.xyz, r0.xywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r3.w, r2.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mov r0.xyw, r3.wywx\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.xyzw, r1.xxxx, r3.xyzw, r0.xyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		min r1.x, r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r0.x, -r1.x\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r1.y, r1.x, l(6.000000), l(0.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, -r0.y, r0.w\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r0.y, r0.y, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.y, r0.y, r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.z, ${color}.x, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.z, |r0.z|\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.z, r0.w, r0.z, -r0.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		ge r0.w, |r0.y|, l(0.266000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		movc r0.y, r0.w, r0.z, |r0.y|\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyyy, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 0.666667, 0.333333)\n
  \t\t\t\t		frc r0.yzw, r0.yyzw\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000, 6.000000), l(0.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000, -3.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add_sat r0.yzw, |r0.yyzw|, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.yzw, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000, -1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.y, r0.x, l(-1)\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r0.x, r0.x, ${color}.z\n
  \t\t\t\t		div r1.x, r1.x, r1.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		add r1.x, r1.x, ${color}.y\n
  \t\t\t\t		mad r0.yzw, r1.xxxx, r0.yyzw, l(0.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000, 1.000000)\n
  \t\t\t\t		mul o2.xyz, r0.yzwy, r0.xxxx\n
  \t\t\t      endif\n
  \t\t    endif\n
  \t\t    sample_aoffimmi_indexable(0,0,0)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r0.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t    if_nz r0.y\n
  \t\t\t		mov o1.w, ${tex69}.y\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	if_nz r0.z\n
  \t\t\t		mov o4.x, ${tex69}.z\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	discard_nz r0.x\n
  \t  endif\n
  endif\n
  ret

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\OutlineTransparency]
  shader_model=ps_4_0 ps_5_0
  temps=ini tex69 tex70 dim texcoord
  filter_index=37730.554688
  if ps-t69 === 0 && $texfx_on
  run = commandlistswapversion
  run = commandlistclearinstancevalues
  run = commandlistresetresources
  endif
  if ps-t70 === 0
  post ps-t70 = null
  endif
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\OutlineTransparency.InsertDeclarations]
  dcl_resource_texture1d (float,float,float,float) t120
  dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t69
  dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t70
  dcl_sampler s15, mode_default
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\OutlineTransparency.Pattern]
  (?s)(?P<MatchOutline>
  dcl_output o0\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o1\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o2\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o3\.x\n
  dcl_output o4\.x\n
  dcl_output o5\.x\n
  .*)
  (?P<ModestyB>^\s*if_nz -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+div -?r\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ge -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+frc -?r\d+\.\w+, \|-?r\d+\.\w+\|\n
  ^\s+movc -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ftou -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mad -?r\d+\.\w+, -?(cb\d\[\d+\]|r\d+)\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\), -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+add -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+lt -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n.*)
  (?P<TillTexcord>sample_[b_]{0,2}indexable\(texture2d\)\(float,float,float,float\) r\d\d?\.[xyzw]+, (?P<TexcoordX>[r]\d\d?\.[xy][yz][xy][xy]), t[0].[xyzw]+, s\d(, \w\d+(\.[xyzw]+)?)?$)
  (?P<TillSetColor>.*else\s*mov (?P<color>r\d\.[xyzw]+), v\d\.[xyzw]+.*endif)
  (?P<TillRet>.*)
  ret
--------- final pcre2 regex pattern used after ini parsing ---------

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\OutlineTransparency.Pattern.Replace]
  ${MatchOutline}\n
  ${ModestyB}
  ${TillTexcord}\n
  mov ${texcoord}.xyzw, ${TexcoordX}\n
  ${TillSetColor}\n
  ld_indexable(texture1d)(float,float,float,float) ${ini}.xyzw, l(69,0), t120.xyzw\n
  if_z ${ini}.y\n
  \t	resinfo_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${dim}.xyyy, l(0), t70.xyyy\n
  \t	if_nz ${dim}.xy\n
  \t\t	sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${tex70}.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t70.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t	mov ${color}, ${tex70}.xyzw\n
  \t	endif\n
  endif\n
  ${TillRet}
  if_z ${ini}.y\n
  \t	resinfo_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${dim}.xyzw, l(0), t69.xyzw\n
  \t	if_nz ${dim}.xy\n
  \t\t	sample_aoffimmi_indexable(1,1,1)(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) ${tex69}.xyzw, ${texcoord}.xyzw, t69.xyzw, s15\n
  \t\t	if_nz ${ini}.w\n
  \t\t\t		add ${tex69}.x, ${tex69}.x, l(-1.0)\n
  \t\t\t		discard_z ${tex69}.x\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t\t	if_z ${ini}.w\n
  \t\t\t		discard_nz ${tex69}.x\n
  \t\t	endif\n
  \t	endif\n
  endif\n
  ret

[ShaderRegex\TexFx\OutlineTransparency53]
  shader_model=ps_4_0 ps_5_0
  temps=ini tex69 tex70 dim texcoord
  filter_index=37730.531250
  if ps-t69 === 0 && $texfx_on
  run = commandlistswapversion53
  run = commandlistclearinstancevalues
  run = commandlistresetresources
  endif
  if ps-t70 === 0
  post ps-t70 = null
  endif
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\OutlineTransparency53.InsertDeclarations]
  dcl_resource_texture1d (float,float,float,float) t120
  dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t69
  dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t70
  dcl_sampler s15, mode_default
[ShaderRegex\TexFx\OutlineTransparency53.Pattern]
  (?s)(?P<MatchOutline>
  dcl_output o0\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o1\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o2\.xyzw\n
  dcl_output o3\.x\n
  dcl_output o4\.x\n
  dcl_output o5\.x\n
  .*)
  (?P<ModestyB>^\s*if_nz -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+div -?r\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+, v?\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ge -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+frc -?r\d+\.\w+, \|-?r\d+\.\w+\|\n
  ^\s+movc -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mul -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+, -?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+ftou -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ -?r\d+\.\w+, -?cb\d\[\d+\]\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+dp\d+\ r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, icb\[r\d+\.\w+ \+.?\d+\]\.\w+\n
  ^\s+mad -?r\d+\.\w+, -?(cb\d\[\d+\]|r\d+)\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\), -?r\d+\.\w+\n
  ^\s+add -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n
  ^\s+lt -?r\d+\.\w+, -?r\d+\.\w+, l\(-?\d*\.?\d+\)\n.*)
  (?P<TillTexcord>sample_[b_]{0,2}indexable\(texture2d\)\(float,float,float,float\) r\d\d?\.[xyzw]+, (?P<TexcoordX>[v]\d\d?\.[xy][yz][xy][xy]), t[0].[xyzw]+, s\d(, \w\d+(\.[xyzw]+)?)?$)
  (?P<TillSetColor>.*else\s*mov (?P<color>r\d\.[xyzw]+), v\d\.[xyzw]+.*endif)
  (?P<TillRet>.*)
  ret

[Present]
  $width = rt_width
  $height = rt_height
  if $menu == 1
  if $oldindexcategory != $indexcategory
  $oldindexcategory = $indexcategory
  $rollerpointmenu = 0
  endif
  $rollercategorymenuold = $rollercategorymenunew
  $rollercategorymenunew = (cursor_window_x / $width)
  $rollerpointmenuold = $rollerpointmenunew
  $rollerpointmenunew = (cursor_window_y / $height)
  if $clickdown == 1
  if cursor_window_y < ($height * 0.0625) && $shiftdown == 1
  $rollercategorymenu = $rollercategorymenu + ($rollercategorymenunew - $rollercategorymenuold)
  if $rollercategorymenu > 0
  $rollercategorymenu = 0
  endif
  local $res = $height/$width
  if $rollercategorymenu < (-1 * $res / 8.0) * $categories
  $rollercategorymenu = (-1 * $res / 8.0) * $categories
  endif
  else if cursor_window_y >= ($height * 0.0625) && cursor_window_x <= $height && $shiftdown == 1 && $menutype == 0
  if $indexcategory == 0
  $rollerpointmenu = $rollerpointmenu - ($rollerpointmenunew - $rollerpointmenuold)
